note: Gate open/close events written as WH_GATE_OPEN/CLOSE records
Gate ops respect reserved control tiles (FreeMap protection)
Time/tick ops write into WH circular area
Energy/TTL decay uses BH pid→cell mapping
IPC send records written as WH_IPC_SEND (0x30) at sc->tick
CVP save/load/validate/replay enforces lock fields in header
CVP save serializes CANVAS_BASE, GATE_STATE, WH_LANE, BH_STATE
CVP replay re-executes WH_LANE records via wh_exec_min()
CVP BH_STATE section captures/restores pid energy
engctx_tick writes WH_OP_TICK heartbeat; engctx_replay reads WH
